proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 + k0 = x1 } = x0 <= x1 }(a, a + b)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: Nat -> T0, x1: Nat) { x0(x1) = T0.0 = coeff_zero_at[T0](x0, x1) }[R](c, k)

goal: coeff_zero_from_at[R](c, n, k) = (not k < n implies coeff_zero_at[R](c, k))
proof: function[T2: Semiring](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> T2) { (x0 < x1 or coeff_zero_at[T2](x2, x0)) = coeff_zero_from_at[T2](x2, x1, x0) }[R](k, n, c)
function(x0: Nat) { coeff_zero_from_at[R](c, n, x0) }(k)

goal: coeff_zero_from[R](c, n) = forall(x0: Nat) { coeff_zero_from_at[R](c, n, x0) }
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Nat -> T0, x1: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat) { coeff_zero_from_at[T0](x0, x1, x2) } = coeff_zero_from[T0](x0, x1) }[R](c, n)
let w0: Nat satisfy { not coeff_zero_from_at[R](c, n, w0) }
function(x0: Nat) { coeff_zero_from_at[R](c, n, x0) }(w0)

goal: coeff_zero_from_at[R](p.coeff, n, k) = (not k < n implies coeff_zero_at[R](p.coeff, k))
proof: function[T2: Semiring](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> T2) { (x0 < x1 or coeff_zero_at[T2](x2, x0)) = coeff_zero_from_at[T2](x2, x1, x0) }[R](k, n, p.coeff)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: Nat -> T0, x1: Nat) { x0(x1) = T0.0 = coeff_zero_at[T0](x0, x1) }[R](p.coeff, k)
let w0: Nat satisfy { not coeff_zero_from_at[R](p.coeff, n, w0) }
function(x0: Nat) { coeff_zero_from_at[R](p.coeff, n, x0) }(w0)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Nat) { coeff_zero_from[T0](x0.coeff, x1) = polynomial_support_bounded_by[T0](x0, x1) }[R](p, n)

goal: coeff_eval(p.coeff, x, m) = coeff_eval(p.coeff, x, n)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Nat) { coeff_zero_from[T0](x0.coeff, x1) = polynomial_support_bounded_by[T0](x0, x1) }[R](p, n)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m) = coeff_eval(p.coeff, x, m)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { coeff_eval[T0](x0.coeff, x1, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, x, m)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = coeff_eval(p.coeff, x, n)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { coeff_eval[T0](x0.coeff, x1, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, x, n)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n)
polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n)

proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Nat -> T0, x1: Nat) { x0(x1) = T0.0 = coeff_zero_at[T0](x0, x1) }[R](Polynomial.zero[R].coeff, k)
let w0: Nat satisfy { not coeff_zero_from_at[R](Polynomial.zero[R].coeff, Nat.0, w0) }
function(x0: Nat) { coeff_zero_from_at[R](Polynomial.zero[R].coeff, Nat.0, x0) }(w0)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Nat) { coeff_zero_from[T0](x0.coeff, x1) = polynomial_support_bounded_by[T0](x0, x1) }[R](Polynomial.zero[R], Nat.0)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[Nat](n)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(Polynomial.zero[R], x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(Polynomial.zero[R], x, Nat.0)
polynomial_eval_bound(Polynomial.zero[R], x, Nat.0) = coeff_eval(Polynomial.zero[R].coeff, x, Nat.0)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { coeff_eval[T0](x0.coeff, x1, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](Polynomial.zero[R], x, Nat.0)
function[T1: Semiring](x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> T1, x2: T1) { Nat.zero != x0 or T1.0 = coeff_eval[T1](x1, x2, x0) }[R](Nat.0, Polynomial.zero[R].coeff, x)

goal: pointwise_add[Nat, R](p.coeff, q.coeff, k) = p.coeff(k) + q.coeff(k)
proof: function[T0, T1: lib(add).Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[Nat, R](p.coeff, q.coeff, k)

goal: coeff_eval(pointwise_add[Nat, R](p.coeff, q.coeff), x, n) = coeff_eval(p.coeff, x, n) + coeff_eval(q.coeff, x, n)
polynomial_eval_bound(p + q, x, n) = coeff_eval((p + q).coeff, x, n)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { coeff_eval[T0](x0.coeff, x1, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p + q, x, n)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = coeff_eval(p.coeff, x, n)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { coeff_eval[T0](x0.coeff, x1, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, x, n)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n) = coeff_eval(q.coeff, x, n)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { coeff_eval[T0](x0.coeff, x1, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](q, x, n)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p + q, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) + polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n)

proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { coeff_eval[T0](x0.coeff, x1, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](Polynomial.constant(r), x, Nat.0.suc)

goal: coeff_eval(c, x, Nat.0.suc) = c(Nat.0) + x * coeff_eval(coeff_tail[R](c), x, Nat.0)
proof: function[T2: Semiring](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> T2, x3: T2) { x0.suc != x1 or x2(Nat.0) + x3 * coeff_eval[T2](coeff_tail[T2](x2), x3, x0) = coeff_eval[T2](x2, x3, x1) }[R](Nat.0, Nat.0.suc, c, x)
function[T1: Semiring](x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> T1, x2: T1) { Nat.zero != x0 or T1.0 = coeff_eval[T1](x1, x2, x0) }[R](Nat.0, coeff_tail[R](c), x)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[R](x)

goal: c(Nat.0) + x * coeff_eval(coeff_tail[R](c), x, Nat.0) = r + R.0

proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[R](R.0, r)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](r)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(Polynomial.one[R], x, Nat.0.suc) = coeff_eval(c, x, Nat.0.suc)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { coeff_eval[T0](x0.coeff, x1, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](Polynomial.one[R], x, Nat.0.suc)

goal: coeff_eval(c, x, Nat.0.suc) = c(Nat.0) + x * coeff_eval(coeff_tail[R](c), x, Nat.0)
proof: function[T2: Semiring](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> T2, x3: T2) { x0.suc != x1 or x2(Nat.0) + x3 * coeff_eval[T2](coeff_tail[T2](x2), x3, x0) = coeff_eval[T2](x2, x3, x1) }[R](Nat.0, Nat.0.suc, c, x)
function[T1: Semiring](x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> T1, x2: T1) { Nat.zero != x0 or T1.0 = coeff_eval[T1](x1, x2, x0) }[R](Nat.0, coeff_tail[R](c), x)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[R](x)

goal: c(Nat.0) + x * coeff_eval(coeff_tail[R](c), x, Nat.0) = R.1 + R.0

proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[R](R.1, R.0)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](R.1)
